failed_approaches.reason: VERIFY failed - UI still shows 'New Chat'. Issue: getHistory(conv.id, 1) only gets 1 message, which might be assistant message. find() for user role returns undefined.

current_strategy.name: add-findFirstUserMessage-method
current_strategy.approach: Add new repository method findFirstUserMessage() with targeted SQL query to get first user message, then use in ChatServer for title generation
steps: 2. Implement findFirstUserMessage() in DrizzleMessageRepository with SQL: WHERE role='user' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1
3. Update ChatServer.ts get_conversations handler to use new method for title generation
4. Generate title from first 60 chars of user message, fallback to 'New Chat' if no messages
5. Write unit tests for new repository method
6. Run integration tests for websocket chat
current_strategy.rationale: Most efficient and scalable - targeted SQL query guarantees first user message without arbitrary limits. Avoids iteration 1 failure mode.

alternatives_rejected.reason: Arbitrary limit, wasteful for simple conversations

tests_added: findFirstUserMessage - should find first user message in conversation
findFirstUserMessage - should return null when no user messages exist
findFirstUserMessage - should return null for conversation with no messages
findFirstUserMessage - should return first user message even when multiple user messages exist

bug_details.title: Conversation titles show IDs instead of meaningful text
bug_details.description: All 82 conversations in sidebar display as 'Conversation {8-char-id}' instead of generated titles from first user message

evidence.expected: Titles from first 50-60 chars of first user message
evidence.actual: Titles show 'Conversation {id}' OR 'New Chat' even when messages exist

root_cause.source: Backend ChatServer generates title from conversation.id instead of first user message
